title: Ability to save frequently used filters as a "favorite" or some other quick-access option
excerpt: Create a way to save frequently used filters from the quick filter view.

posts.author: kelliem (Kellie M)
posts.cookedHtml: Create a way to save frequently used filters from the quick filter view.

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml:
Would this be in addition to saving your settings as a view?

Typically I just save my filter, and other display settings, as a view I can pick from the top of the board. Unless you’re talking about a very large number of filters.

posts.author: kelliem (Kellie M)
posts.cookedHtml: It could be on a widget or a view. Instead of having to save numerous different versions of a widget or view to zero in on different teams, for example, you could save these “team filters” so you could apply them in different widgets or views as needed.
